title: Multi-Channel Descriptor (MCD) support
body:
Attached is my initial attempt at MCD support (ref: #2190). 

There appears to be some constraint in place which requires file descriptors to be "simple variables" (see, V3LinkResolve.cpp:exactDescriptor). This constraint has prevented me from being able to insert a file descriptor into an array; an operation that would otherwise be valid (see the attached test case). I was wondering what the motivation behind this constraint was and whether it could be relaxed.

Also, I'm unsure whether the code for the AstFOpen node in V3EmitV.cpp is correct. This code appears to insert the file-descriptor into the first argument of the $fopen function call which is not correct: $fopen(fd, filename, type). The new implementation for AstFOpenMcd does not do this and instead obeys the standard Verilog argument list: $fopen(filename), so there is some inconsistency.

Any would appreciate if you could review the proposed patch and get back to me with any required changes.
